mapper.insert:
SELECT BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD (BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer})

if.test: searchType != null and searchType != '' and keyword != null and keyword != ''

choose.when: AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) )
AND ( content LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) OR writer LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) )
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) OR writer LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) )

mapper.select:
SELECT board_no, title, content, writer, reg_date FROM ( SELECT inner_tbl.board_no, inner_tbl.title, inner_tbl.content, inner_tbl.writer, inner_tbl.reg_date, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM ( SELECT board_no, title, content, writer, reg_date FROM board WHERE board_no > 0
ORDER BY board_no DESC, reg_date DESC ) inner_tbl WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{sizePerPage} * #{page}) ) WHERE rnum >= (#{sizePerPage} * (#{page} - 1) + 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_no > 0
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
